series_metadata.series_title: Regional Physician Advisory Board Meeting Material
series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to ORC 4765.05 the state board of emergency medical services must appoint regional physician advisory boards. These boards meet a minimum of four times annually to conduct business as related to duties required in OAC 4765-3-04. The minutes of these meetings reflect the activities of the boards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Copies of minutes and related documents are retained for two years or until superceded, obsolete, or replaced then to state archives., Paper: Shred
